headline: McDonald’s rival closes 729 more restaurants
summary: McDonald's most impressive feat is not that it rose to the top of the fast-food chain; it's that it managed to stay there. The chain was founded in 1940, but its true rise to prominence came in the 1970s. It was a simple model based on offering hot food quickly with an experience that was the same ...
